benefits.description: Almost no loose skin while losing weight; made a huge difference in stomach area during weight loss

side_effects.description: Bruising and welts when injecting in stomach area; no stinging or welts when injecting in upper glutes area

protocol_notes: First run was 1-2mg daily, now doing 5mg daily. Best injection site found to be upper glutes/just under hip bone toward the back. Avoids stomach area due to bruising and welts.
